children.heading: Experts and consultants
children.label: a Experts and consultants
children.text: For purposes of carrying out this subchapter, the Advisory Commission may procure temporary and intermittent services of experts or consultants under .section 3109(b) of title 5

children.heading: Detail of staff of Federal agencies
children.label: b Detail of staff of Federal agencies
children.text: Upon request of the Executive Director of the Advisory Commission, the head of any Federal department or agency may detail, on a reimbursable basis, any of the personnel of that department or agency to the Advisory Commission to assist it in carrying out this subchapter.

children.heading: Administrative support services
children.label: c Administrative support services
children.text: Upon the request of the Advisory Commission, the Administrator of General Services shall provide to the Advisory Commission, on a reimbursable basis, the administrative support services necessary for the Advisory Commission to carry out its duties under this subchapter.

children.heading: Contract authority
children.label: d Contract authority
children.text: The Advisory Commission may, subject to appropriations, contract with and compensate government and private persons (including agencies) for property and services used to carry out its duties under this subchapter.
